mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reset is asserted while enable remains high
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_DISABLE_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_reset
P_DUTY_DIRECTION_BOUNDS mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_polarity

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: soft_ref is below vref during enabled clock updates
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_SOFT_START_TRACKING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_gain

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: the first in-tolerance clock update occurs
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_POWER_GOOD_QUALIFICATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=qualification_count_error

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: the PWM state requests a high output
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_PWM_ENCODING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=weak_rail
